tweets.full_text:
Claude Code、入れようとしてNode.jsかGitで止まったまま、もう何週間経ちましたか？
「便利そうだ」と分かっていても、最初の数十分でつまずくと、そこから戻ってこられないケースは本当によくあります。

このセミナーは、Claude Codeの便利な使い方講座ではありません。
「自分のPCに入れて、明日から自社業務に当てる」ための実演型セットアップ講座です。

扱うのは、
・必要ツール（Node.js／Git／関連CLI）のインストール手順
・Claude Code本体の導入と初回起動
・推奨初期設定
・GAS連動のための周辺ツール（claspなど）の導入と認証
まで、一気通貫です。

ゴールは、受講直後に「自分のPCでClaude Codeを起動し、明日からどの業務に最初に当てるか」が決まっている状態。

▼日時：2026年6月6日(土) 8:00–9:00
▼開催：Zoom（オンライン）
▼参加費：無料

詳細・お申し込みはリプ欄から。

[#Rerply]
お申し込みはこちらから。Zoomで一緒にセットアップを進めていきましょう。
https://t.co/umNr2f82jk

tweets.full_text:
このプラグインをインストールすると、Claude Codeの感じ方が完全に異なります。おそらく、Claude Codeは「なかなか良い」という感じから、実際のAI開発環境に変わります。クラウドコードセットアップという名前の公式のプラグインが静かにリリースされ、プロジェクトをスキャンして以下を推奨します：
→ フック
→ スキル
→ MCPサーバ
→ サブエージェント
→ 自動化
それから、すべてを段階的に設定してくれます。ほとんどの人々がClaude Codeを完全にバニラの状態で使用しているため、体験がめちゃくちゃに感じられます。本当の力は、それを取り巻くエコシステムから来るのです。是非インストールしてみてください。お忘れなく。

quoted_status.full_text:
The fusion of Codex and ChatGPT is progressing further, because @OpenAI Codex now has memory!

This is quietly a big deal.

Codex is no longer just a code agent you drop into a repo. It seems to be building a persistent model of how you work: your preferences, your past conversations, your habits, and the kind of feedback that is actually useful to you.

And apparently you can inspect it here:

~/codex/memories/memory_summary.md

This is where coding agents start to feel much less like tools, and much more like long-running collaborators.

tweets.full_text:
大規模コードベースでClaude Codeを成功させるには、モデル性能よりも「ハーネス」の設計が重要。

CLAUDE.md・hooks・skills・plugins・MCPサーバー・LSP連携・subagentsを段階的に整備し、コードベースを階層的に読み解きやすくすることが鍵である。

加えて、設定の定期的な見直しと、専任オーナー（agent manager等）を置く組織体制も成功要因として挙げられている。

user.name: NAOTO
user.description: 生成AIエンジニアとして世の中の業務効率化を推進し、共に良い物を育てて行く事を理念に掲げています。

tweets.full_text:
Claude Code が動かへんとき、これ試してみ。

「なんで今判断できへんの？必要な情報を教えて」って聞く。

そしたら「〇〇が不足しています」って自分でちゃんと答えてくれる。

AIが詰まる理由はAI自身が一番わかってるし、
直接聞くのが最速やったわ。

「CIや外部アプリからエージェントを自動実行する」

ここを混ぜると、便利な自動化ほどあとで驚きやすい。

quoted_status.full_text:
If you are running a consulting business and you are deploying Anthropic or OpenAI directly into your organization (I’m looking at you PwC and Accenture) you are letting the fox into the hen house. 

OpenAI and Anthropic are openly funding and starting competitors to you while also using your usage to drive more success for them. 

This is not a failure on their part but a failure on your part. 

Consulting businesses that understand this are adopting a control plane that allows them to arbitrate where tokens go and who generates tokens for them. 

Controlling the tokens is controlling the spice (Dune). 

This was a key pillar of 8090’s  global partnership with EY and they key feature of our Software Factory. We control token generation and can direct them to any model provider.

We are close to another global partnership and will announce it soon. 

These organizations refuse to accept the disruption standing still or, even worse, by adopting and accelerating the companies who want to disrupt them.

user.name: Chamath Palihapitiya
user.description: God is in the details.

tweets.full_text:
And we at SemiAnalysis only represents the tip of the iceberg. We track Claude Code Github Commits daily, and the image below represents what it looked like in Feb 2026 (Hint: Our daily tracker has is showing the line only going up further up and to the right since this publicly available chart in Feb). But we still think we are in the early innings.

The banks aren't using it. Enterprises are still figuring out how to use it effectively. Compliance and IT teams are still figuring out guardrails. The gap between "this is obviously useful" and "we've actually wired it into how our analysts work every day" is still massive at most places. (3/3)

The buy versus build discussion for Enterprise has a new dimension now.

What was there:

- buy sw
- build sw

Now there is a new dimension….

- build a workflow in Claude Code/Codex/pick your harness

tweets.full_text:
I just built a Claude Code SEO agent that replaces your $200/mo. Ahrefs subscription 🤯

One prompt → keyword gaps found, competitors analyzed, content written in your brand voice, rankings tracked weekly.

All inside Claude Code.

Perfect for DTC brands and agencies who know SEO matters but never have the bandwidth to actually do it consistently.

This agent runs the entire loop for you:

→ Connects to Google Search Console and pulls your real ranking data
→ Finds your "gap zone" — keywords sitting at positions 5–20
→ Scrapes who's outranking you and breaks down exactly why they're winning
→ Interviews you once about your brand, customers, and positioning
→ Writes content in your voice — not generic AI slop that tanks after 90 days
→ Tracks rankings weekly and feeds results back into the next cycle

No expensive tools you barely open.
No freelancers writing content that sounds like everyone else.
No manually checking rankings and forgetting to act on it.

What you get:

- Keyword cards with a specific action for each gap zone opportunity
- A competitive breakdown showing who's beating you and the exact fix
- A weekly content plan generated from your real GSC data
- A brand voice profile Claude uses for every article it writes

Built 100% in Claude Code with Google Search Console.

I put together a full playbook with the skill files, brand interview, and the exact weekly workflow.

Want it for free?

> Like this post
> Comment "SEO"

And I'll send it over (must be following @learnwithella so I can DM)
